question: What is the object in the lower left portion of the image? Select from the following options: (A) Cactus with a flower on its head. (B) Cactus with an eye on it. (C) A green cactus case for an iPhone. (D) None of the above.
answer_choices: Cactus with a flower on its head
Cactus with an eye on it
A green cactus case for an iPhone
